columns.Name: ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key identifier for PER_PEOPLE table.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Start date at the address.

columns.Name: STYLE
columns.Comments: Address style - foreign key to FND_TERRITORIES.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: The first line of the address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: The second line of the address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE3
columns.Comments: The third line of the address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_TYPE
columns.Comments: Address type, for example, home, business, weekend.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country where this address belongs.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: End date at this address.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: National code to identify addresses in a specific country.

columns.Name: REGION_1
columns.Comments: Primary region in which the address is located.

columns.Name: REGION_2
columns.Comments: Sub region of region 1 in which the address is located.

columns.Name: REGION_3
columns.Comments: Sub region of region 2 in which the address is located.

columns.Name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.Comments: Name of the town or city.

columns.Name: ADDR_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: DERIVED_LOCALE
columns.Comments: Displays the area where the address is, for example City, Country or City, State, Country. The exact format varies with country, and the contents are populated from the other fields on the address

columns.Name: GEOMETRY
columns.Comments: Specifies coordinates of the location defined by the address. Special datatype required to store.
